articles.title: Microsoft discovers new lightweight backdoor that steals cryptocurrency
articles.content: Crypto Clipper spreads over USB and communicates over Tor.
articles.titleZh: 微软发现窃取加密货币的新型轻量级后门
articles.contentZh: Crypto Clipper通过USB进行传播，并通过Tor进行通信。

articles.title: Apple patches high-severity eavesdropping vulnerability in Beats Studio Buds
articles.content: The vulnerability, disclosed 12 months ago, affects multiple manufacturers.
articles.titleZh: Apple修补了Beats Studio Buds中的高严重性窃听漏洞
articles.contentZh: 该漏洞于12个月前披露，影响多个制造商。

articles.title: Before SpaceX IPO, investors in China secretly acquired stakes
articles.content: One previously unreported SpaceX investor has ties to Chinese military contractors.
articles.titleZh: SpaceX IPO前，中国投资者秘密收购股权
articles.contentZh: 一位此前未被报道的SpaceX投资者与中国军事承包商有联系。

articles.title: Massive breach spills credentials for thousands of sensitive networks
articles.content: The affected include Oracle, Lenovo, FedEx, a NATO contractor, and Fortinet.
articles.titleZh: 大规模泄露泄露了数千个敏感网络的凭据
articles.contentZh: 受影响的公司包括甲骨文、联想、北约承包商FedEx和Fortinet。

articles.title: Barret Zoph is out at OpenAI again after just five months
articles.content: Five months after returning to OpenAI, Barret Zoph - the company's head of enterprise AI sales - has departed, The Verge has learned. Zoph returned to OpenAI in mid-January after a stint as co-founder and CTO of Thinking Machines Lab, the competing AI company founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati. Shortly after Zoph returned […]
articles.titleZh: Barret Zoph在短短五个月后再次离开OpenAI
articles.contentZh: The Verge了解到，在重返OpenAI五个月后，该公司的企业人工智能销售主管Barret Zoph已经离职。Zoph在担任Thinking Machines Lab的联合创始人兼首席技术官一段时间后，于1月中旬重返OpenAI ， Thinking Machines Lab是由前OpenAI首席技术官Mira Murati创立的竞争AI公司。Zoph回来后不久[…]

articles.title: Valve is so behind on Steam Controller orders that some won’t ship until 2027
articles.content: Valve has some good news and bad news about Steam Controllers. The good news: If you make a reservation for a Steam Controller, the company will now show you one of three estimates of when you'll be able to actually order your gamepad: by September 2026, by December 2026, or sometime in 2027. The bad […]
articles.titleZh: Valve在Steam控制器订单上如此落后，以至于有些订单要到2027年才能发货
articles.contentZh: 关于蒸汽控制器， Valve有一些好消息和坏消息。好消息：如果您预订了Steam手柄，该公司现在将向您展示三种预估的游戏手柄实际订购时间之一： 2026年9月、2026年12月或2027年某个时候。坏的[…]
